sourceText: 6 5 7 4 7 6 3 7 % Financial infrastructure to grow your revenue.
Accept payments, offer financial services, and implement custom revenue models—from your first transaction to your billionth.

designIntent.summary: Referencia tecnica confiavel com dashboards, codigo, mapas, fluxos de pagamento e gradientes com muita precisao.
designIntent.hero: Pagamentos, codigo e escala global em um painel claro.
designIntent.nonGoal: Nao e DS final do cliente; nao contem fluxo real de formulario.

gradients.name: Payment Glow
gradients.value: radial-gradient(circle at 18% 22%, rgba(99,91,255,.28), transparent 34%), radial-gradient(circle at 82% 70%, rgba(0,212,255,.24), transparent 38%)

semantic.contrastIntent: AA minimum for body text; generated preview overrides --c2 as light surface and --c3 as dark text to avoid low-contrast sections.

contextualUsageRules.text: Usar token semantico com contraste AA.
contextualUsageRules.background: Usar surface/background conforme personalidade do site.

fontFamilies.mono: Source Code Pro, ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace
fontFamilies.loading: local when available; fallback stack otherwise

icons.rule: icone nao desloca layout no hover

motion.parallax: limited scroll response with reduced-motion fallback

accessibility.contrast: AA minimo; overlay obrigatorio sobre imagem

risks: Gradiente nao pode reduzir contraste de codigo.

rules: Hero full viewport com dashboard/codigo e gradiente tecnico.
Menu deve separar products, developers, resources e pricing.
Cards precisam mostrar numeros e confianca.
Motion usa fluxo, draw-line e shimmer discreto.

menuSystem.note: Menu fintech tecnico: pronto para comprador e dev.
menuSystem.behavior: overlay flyout, Esc closes, link closes

referenceUsage.purpose: Insumo de infraestrutura, confianca e tecnologia. O DS final herda clareza tecnica e motion de fluxo.
nonGoals: nao criar DS final do cliente
nao usar padrao generico para todos os sites
differentiationRules: Hero full viewport com dashboard/codigo e gradiente tecnico.
Menu deve separar products, developers, resources e pricing.
Cards precisam mostrar numeros e confianca.
Motion usa fluxo, draw-line e shimmer discreto.
referenceUsage.qualityRule: Preview precisa demonstrar personalidade do site extraido, com menu completo, hero, tokens, gradientes, tipo, efeitos, componentes, cards/secoes, story parallax, icones, handoff e motion linkados.

globalTokens.radius: 0-10px conforme referencia; cards ate 8px salvo marcas arredondadas
